data.acceptance:
1. `make build` — local cross-platform builds.
2. `make test` — `go test ./...` race + coverage.
3. `make integration` — runs `//go:build integration` jobs (K-16) against real `age`.
4. `make lint` — `go vet`, `staticcheck`, `gosec`.
5. `make vuln` — `govulncheck`.
6. `make verify-release VERSION=…` — calls K-41's verify script.
7. `make help` — prints target descriptions. Acceptance:
8. All targets work on a clean checkout.
9. CI workflows from Wave 3 invoke `make` targets directly so local and CI stay in sync.
